title: The Lover
tmdbOverview: A poor French teenage girl engages in an illicit affair with a wealthy Chinese heir in 1920s Saigon. For the first time in her young life she has control, and she wields it deftly over her besotted lover throughout a series of clandestine meetings and torrid encounters.
synopsis: Released in 1992, The Lover is a drama and romance film from France and United Kingdom. It carries a 6.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
